mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0504_04-02_1#Sql001 */ MUAI.NAME_KANJI, MUAI.BUTEN_CODE, MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI WHERE MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_BOND_F_SALES_PRICE ( /* @SQLID=SUB0504_04-02_1#Sql003 */ IFA_ACCOUNT_SEQ_NO ,BUTEN_CODE ,ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,AMOUNT ,BASE_DATE ,ORDER_TIME ,CREATE_TIME ,CREATE_USER ,UPDATE_TIME ,UPDATE_USER ) ( SELECT IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(CORDYS.SEQ_T_BOND_F_SALES_PRICE.NEXTVAL,5,'0') ,#{req.butenCode} ,TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) ,#{req.amount} ,TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.createUser} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.updateUser} FROM DUAL )
